name: Quad Morph Filter
author: OTODESK
description: A real-time XY morphing filter with 28 premium filter models, equal-power blending of up to 4 filters, and 19 LFO waveforms
changes:
Official Release

28 meticulously modeled filter algorithms. Morph up to 4 different filters simultaneously with equal-power blending, control them via 19 LFO waveforms, record your own XY patterns, and explore infinite sonic territories in real time.
